title: Hammerwatch
description:
A hack and slash action adventure, set in a fantasy pixel art environment. Play solo or co-op in this adventure from bottom to top of Castle Hammerwatch. Kill hordes of enemies with varied looks and features through four unique environments with traps, hidden secrets and puzzles.Key Features• 6 different classes, with unique features and skills

• Character development through unlocks and upgrades

• Hard, medium and easy of course

• Customize difficulty with several different modifiers

• Controller support, supports various different gamepads

• Multiplayer COOP, for up to four players, online, LAN and local

• PC, MAC and Linux support

• Mod and editing support, make your own levels and change other things to your liking
description_short: A hack and slash action adventure, set in a fantasy pixel art environment. Play solo or co-op in this adventure from bottom to top of Castle Hammerwatch. Kill hordes of enemies with varied looks and features through four unique environments with traps, hidden secrets and puzzles.
